---
title: "Building a Quarto Website and Using GitHub"
author: 
  - name: Eleana Cabello
date: 2026-07-24
draft: true
---

# Pre-lecture activities

Before class, complete the tasks listed in the [pre-reading materials](/readings/index_R07.qmd).

# Lecture

## Learning objectives

::: callout-note
### Learning objectives

**At the end of this lesson you will be able to:**

- Create a Github repository 
- Setup a Quarto Website
- Publish your Quarto website through Github Pages
- Customize your Quarto Website
:::

## Slides

-   [Lecture 07: Building a Quarto Website and Using GitHub]()
